description.value: The special forces unit is equipped with large, heavy shields. This allows the troop to Raise its Shields, giving it and its commander a +2 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of its next turn. Additionally, this gives the troop the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.Shield Block] reaction. Shielded troops can't also have composite bows or pikes.
